callout.p: 源码校准：原 9.x 小节已有图，但部分标题与图内容错位。下面补充当前实现真实时序；Stop/Timeout/Retry 在当前 API 中尚未形成完整控制面，应在后续里程碑补齐。

h3: 源码校准 A：创建 Agent 与 Environment
whiteboard: sequenceDiagram participant UI as React Console participant API as Express API participant Store as SQLite Store UI->>API: POST /v1/agents API->>Store: createAgent(config) Store-->>API: agent + agent_version API-->>UI: 201 agent UI->>API: POST /v1/environments API->>Store: createEnvironment(config) Store-->>API: environment API-->>UI: 201 environment

sequenceDiagram participant UI as React Console participant API as Express API participant Store as SQLite Store participant Runner as runner.ts participant Provider as provider.ts participant Runtime as runtime.ts UI->>API: POST /v1/sessions API->>Store: createSession(status=created) API->>Runner: bootstrapSession(sessionId) Runner->>Store: event system.bootstrapping / idle UI->>API: POST /v1/sessions/{id}/events API->>Store: createSessionEvent(user.message) API->>Runner: runUserMessage(sessionId,text) Runner->>Store: updateSessionStatus(running) Runner->>Provider: callProvider(messages, tools) Provider-->>Runner: assistant text or tool_calls Runner->>Runtime: executeTool(sessionId, tool) Runtime-->>Runner: tool result Runner->>Store: agent/tool events Runner->>Store: updateSessionStatus(idle or failed)
h3: 源码校准 C：SSE 事件流
whiteboard: sequenceDiagram participant UI as React Console participant API as Express API participant Hub as eventHub.ts participant Store as SQLite Store participant Runner as runner.ts UI->>API: GET /v1/sessions/{id}/events/stream API->>Hub: subscribe(sessionId) Runner->>Store: createSessionEvent(...) Runner->>Hub: emitSessionEvent(sessionId,event) Hub-->>API: event callback API-->>UI: SSE data: event UI->>API: GET /v1/sessions/{id}/events API->>Store: listSessionEvents(sessionId) Store-->>UI: full history
